subject: Chore: Update local-builder and local-packer
commit_message:
Chore: Update local-builder and local-packer

Remove zipp and virtualenv, these packages are covered in
global-jjb install python tools macro.
Update latest version of more-itertools
Remove more-itertools

Issue-ID: CIMAN-33
Signed-off-by: Jessica Wagantall <jwagantall@linuxfoundation.org>
Signed-off-by: Kevin Sandi <ksandi@contractor.linuxfoundation.org>
Change-Id: Id00c4df8ee435c78dbff3af207396b685c003b65
